title: Shaadi.com is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Shaadi.com is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Shaadi.com family as a Full Stack Developer in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Shaadi.com:
Shaadi.com is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shaadi.com!
